title: Authorized medical practitioners for the purposes of the medical expense tax credit - Canada.ca
content:
## Authorized medical practitioners for the purposes of the medical expense tax credit
The following list identifies the health care professionals recognized by the Canada Revenue Agency as medical practitioners for the purposes of the medical expense tax credit.
If you believe this list is not up to date, you may request changes. To do so, submit the information requested on Requesting changes to the list of provincially/territorially authorized medical practitioners .
Combined lab and x-ray technologist
Counselling therapist
Criminologist (as a legally qualified psychotherapist)
- Podiatrist (podiatric surgeon, doctor of podiatric medicine) now authorized in Nova Scotia (effective April 1, 2024 )
- Social service worker (registered social service worker) now authorized in Ontario (effective December 30, 2017 )
- Medical radiation technologist now authorized in Newfoundland and Labrador (effective May 1, 2025)
- Behaviour analyst now authorized in Ontario (effective July 1, 2024)
- Income Tax Folio S1-F1-C1, Medical Expense Tax Credit

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
